summary.headline: Padawan is in watch mode. The system is fine, but the weather-air mix can turn ugly fast.
summary.detail: Padawan covers 69.5% of the three-council land area. Heat index 36.1C, AQI 78, 8.1 mm rain risk over 6 hours, 6 aircraft in the KCH envelope, 64 multilingual headlines, and 0 locally relevant Google Trends hits.
